$comment: Museum sets (design doc §5): groups of Compendium entries completed by DONATING a Pristine specimen of each listed resource. A completed set grants a permanent effect that survives Migration; the Curator's Cabinet upgrade (museumSetBonusMult) scales the granted values while owned. Donation is the three-way Pristine choice made real: sell the windfall, offer it to the Rite, or bank permanence here. Sets and effect sizes are first guesses over the four MVP zones' resources; more sets (and the full Compendium plates around them) come with the content pass.
